prompt: Kısa test. Albion Online Data Project resmi price verisi için kısa kaynak özeti çıkar. Mümkünse araç kullan.
raw_output: Based on the available information, there is no official source for Albion Online Data Project resmi price verisi (official price data). The project provides an API that can be used by developers and third-party tools to access market prices and other features. However, direct access to the official price data from the API requires a separate approach or integration with third-party tools like the Albion Free Market Data Client Tutorial.
